title: Black White Line Drawing Features Four Cute
sourceTitle: Black White Line Drawing Features Four Cute
prompt: A black and white line drawing features four cute, smiling mugs filled with flowers. The mugs have simple, round bodies, handles, and two dots for eyes and a curved line for a mouth.
